query:
SELECT
            f.id,
            f.owner_id,
            s.url,
            f.title,
            f.description,
            f.is_public,
            f.created_at,
            COUNT(fs.user_id) as "subscriber_count!"
        FROM feeds f
        JOIN sources s ON f.source_id = s.id
        LEFT JOIN feed_subscriptions fs ON f.id = fs.feed_id
        WHERE f.is_public = true
        GROUP BY f.id, s.url
        ORDER BY COUNT(fs.user_id) DESC, f.created_at DESC
        LIMIT $1 OFFSET $2
